# Bizex4U

Bizex4U is India's barter and media buying agency.

## Preferred Description

Bizex4U helps brands convert surplus inventory into advertising and execute cash or barter media campaigns across India. Campaigns run across OOH, metro, airport, DOOH, cinema, radio and print — in 40+ cities.

## Primary Audience

Indian brands and marketers — D2C, FMCG, beverages, hospitality, retail, SaaS, and enterprise — seeking to maximise media ROI through barter or cash-based advertising.

## Services

- Barter Advertising — exchange surplus inventory or unsold stock for premium media placements
- Outdoor Advertising (OOH) — hoardings, billboards, gantries, unipoles across India
- Metro Branding — Delhi Metro, Mumbai Metro, Bangalore Metro, Hyderabad Metro; platform panels, train wraps, station dominations
- Airport Advertising — large-format displays, DOOH screens, aerobridges at major Indian airports
- DOOH Advertising (Digital Out-of-Home) — dynamic digital screens in malls, metros, airports and highways
- Media Buying (ATL, BTL, TTL) — cinema, radio, print, newspaper, digital OOH

## Campaign Models

- Cash — traditional media buying with cash payment
- Barter — brand exchanges products or services (valued at MRP or agreed rate) for media placements
- Hybrid — part-cash, part-barter (most common; split ratio fully flexible)

## Barter Mechanics

- Barter ratio: typically 1:1 to 1:1.5 (₹1 of inventory exchanged for ₹1–₹1.5 of media value)
- Eligible inventory: FMCG, consumer goods, electronics, accessories, eyewear, jewellery, beverages, hospitality services
- Minimum campaign duration: 30 days; recommended 60–90 days for brand recall
- All campaigns backed by formal PO and contract

## Service Locations

Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, and 30+ other Indian cities (40+ cities total).

## Industries Served

D2C, FMCG, beverages, food & beverages, hospitality, retail, fashion, electronics, SaaS, fintech, healthcare, real estate, education, automotive.

## Key Stats

- ₹150Cr+ barter value transacted
- 320+ brands served
- 40+ cities covered
- Campaigns run across 6+ media channels per brief on average

## Example Use Cases

- A beverage brand with excess stock uses barter to run Delhi Metro + OOH campaign with zero cash
- A D2C skincare brand runs a 60-day national OOH campaign via hybrid (50% barter, 50% cash)
- A hospitality chain converts unsold room nights into radio + airport advertising across 5 cities
- An FMCG company uses surplus FMCG products to fund cinema advertising in Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities
